fields.name: _id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the message

fields.name: _templateId
fields.description: Template ID associated with the message

fields.name: _environmentId
fields.description: Environment ID where the message is sent

fields.name: _messageTemplateId
fields.description: Message template ID

fields.name: _organizationId
fields.description: Organization ID associated with the message

fields.name: _notificationId
fields.description: Notification ID associated with the message

fields.name: _subscriberId
fields.description: Subscriber ID associated with the message

fields.name: subscriber
fields.description: Subscriber details, if available

fields.name: template
fields.description: Workflow template associated with the message

fields.name: templateIdentifier
fields.description: Identifier for the message template

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Creation date of the message

fields.name: deliveredAt
fields.description: Array of delivery dates for the message, if the message has multiple delivery dates, for example after being snoozed

fields.name: lastSeenDate
fields.description: Last seen date of the message, if available

fields.name: lastReadDate
fields.description: Last read date of the message, if available

fields.name: content
fields.description: Content of the message, can be an email block or a string

fields.name: transactionId
fields.description: Transaction ID associated with the message

fields.name: subject
fields.description: Subject of the message, if applicable

fields.name: channel
fields.description: Channel type through which the message is sent

fields.name: read
fields.description: Indicates if the message has been read

fields.name: seen
fields.description: Indicates if the message has been seen

fields.name: snoozedUntil
fields.description: Date when the message will be unsnoozed

fields.name: email
fields.description: Email address associated with the message, if applicable

fields.name: phone
fields.description: Phone number associated with the message, if applicable

fields.name: directWebhookUrl
fields.description: Direct webhook URL for the message, if applicable

fields.name: providerId
fields.description: Provider ID associated with the message, if applicable

fields.name: deviceTokens
fields.description: Device tokens associated with the message, if applicable

fields.name: title
fields.description: Title of the message, if applicable

fields.name: cta
fields.description: Call to action associated with the message

fields.name: _feedId
fields.description: Feed ID associated with the message, if applicable

fields.name: status
fields.description: Status of the message

fields.name: errorId
fields.description: Error ID if the message has an error

fields.name: errorText
fields.description: Error text if the message has an error

fields.name: payload
fields.description: The payload that was used to send the notification trigger

fields.name: overrides
fields.description: Provider specific overrides used when triggering the notification

fields.name: contextKeys
fields.description: Context (single or multi) in which the message was sent
